description_long: This is a round, flat pizza with a lightly browned, slightly puffy crust and a pale, flour-dusted surface. The pizza is topped with six evenly spaced, bright green leaves, likely representing basil or spinach, arranged in a radial pattern. The crust appears to be of medium thickness, with a rustic, hand-formed look and some uneven browning. There is no visible sauce, cheese, or other traditional pizza toppings, giving it a minimalist and artisanal appearance. The surface texture of the crust is matte and slightly rough, with visible flour and baked spots. The pizza is presented without any packaging or branding, and the toppings are clearly distinguishable against the pale background.
description: A round, rustic pizza with a pale, flour-dusted crust and six bright green leaf toppings arranged in a circle. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with no visible sauce or cheese.
description_view_0: The pizza is seen from a low angle, showing the full round shape, pale crust, and all six green leaves clearly arranged in a radial pattern.
description_view_1: This view highlights the pizza's slightly uneven crust and the central placement of the green leaves, with the leaf at the top edge most prominent.
description_view_2: The pizza's surface and leaf arrangement are clearly visible, with the crust's browning and flour texture more apparent on the left side.
description_view_3: The pizza is shown with the green leaves and crust in focus, and the leaf at the bottom edge is most prominent in this view.
